rulings.Case Title: JOHN DAVID LESHY ET AL VS. SEAN WHELAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Sf Garage Company Incs Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement With Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SF GARAGE COMPANY, INC. Notice Of Defendant Sf Garage Company Incs Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement With Plaintiffs continued to May 17, 2019. Sean Whelan is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than May 1, 2019 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ELSA CASILLAS ET AL VS. CHEN DONG HUANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Based Upon Failure To Respond To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF ELSA CASILLAS, RAMON CASILLAS, MARIO CASILLAS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Based Upon Failure To Respond To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. All admissions, except those not specifically denied in April 5, 2019 responses, are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,000 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CRUZ ET AL VS. ALLEN WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: All Plaintiffs Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Defendants Answers Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Demurrer To Defendants Answers By Plaintiffs Declaration In Support Of Plaintiffs Demurrer To Defendants Answers By Plaintiffs Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF JOSE CRUZ, CLAUDIA LOBO, NORMA LOBO, KELIS LOVO-IRAHETA, BYRON ORELLANA, CLAUDIA LOBO AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM, CLAUDIA LOBO AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR, CLAUDIA LOBO AS All Plaintiffs Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Defendants Answers Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Demurrer To Defendants Answers By Plaintiffs Declaration In Support Of Plaintiffs Demurrer To Defendants Answers By Plaintiffs Counsel continued to May 17, 2019. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition no later than May 1, 2019 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DOREEN MARIE BARRANGO VS. ROSITA LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF DOREEN BARRANGO Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation GRANTED. Defendants are in breach of the settlement agreement. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ROBIN NOEL UGARTE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT ROBIN NOEL MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, subject to filing and presenting a valid proof of service at the hearing. Proof of service currently on file is insufficient, declarant does not purport to be the person serving the defendant; additionally, no proof of service on other parties in the case on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CORINA CASTILLO VS. ROBERTO VILLANUEVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ROBERTO VILLANUEVA MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding applicability of SFRO 37.9(b) under the circumstances of this case. The Court notes that copies of the decisions have not been provided to the Court. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC W. WONG VS. ROSA CORADO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 17, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT ROSA CORADO, OSCAR HERRERA, ANGELA SHOCKNESS, YESSENIA HERRERA, JOSE SARABIA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to April 19, 2019. Court reporter requested. = (501/CFH)
